scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && env ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=1 ELECTRON_OZONE_PLATFORM_HINT=x11 XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11 ./node_modules/electron/dist/electron --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --disable-software-rasterizer --disable-dev-shm-usage --in-process-gpu --disable-features=UseOzonePlatform --ozone-platform=x11 electron/main.mjs
scripts.test:session-flow: vitest run src/bridge/contract.test.ts src/uiErrors.test.ts src/App.startSession.test.tsx src/App.pollingStatus.test.tsx src/App.cancelSession.test.tsx
scripts.test:cancel-migration: vitest run electron/fastApiFallback.test.mjs electron/bridgeResponses.test.mjs src/bridge/contract.test.ts src/App.cancelSession.test.tsx
scripts.test:frontend-checkpoint: npm run test:electron-bridge && npm run test:session-flow
scripts.build:web: npm run sync:detectors && tsc -b --incremental false && vite build
